scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAS
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 56784 RTP/AVP 8 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Content-Type: application/sdp Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 56784 RTP/AVP 8 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$invVia] [last_Record-Route:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$invCSeq] Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655766 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 56784 RTP/AVP 8 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20

UPDATE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 UPDATE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length:[len]

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186684 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.55.78 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186684 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.55.78 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:abcd@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
